title: tradescantia humilis
intro: Tradescantia humilis, also known as Small Spiderwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Commelinaceae family. Tradescantia humilis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and digestive problems due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, Tradescantia humilis is often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antiviral properties.
